zRdistutils.command.build_scripts
Implements the Distutils 'build_scripts' command.

build_scripts.runc
j	slt
}	|	s
Copy each script listed in 'self.scripts'; if it's marked as a
        Python script in the Unix way (first line matches 'first_line_re',
        ie. starts with "\#!" and contains "python"), then adjust the first
        line to refer to the current Python interpreter as we copy.
        Fz
not copying %s (up-to-date)
rbNr
%s is an empty file (skipping)T
copying and adjusting %s -> %sZ
BINDIRz
python%s%sZ

utf-8z.The shebang ({!r}) is not decodable from utf-8zAThe shebang ({!r}) is not decodable from the script encoding ({})
posixz
changing mode of %si
z!changing mode of %s from %o to %o)+Z
